name: Mexican Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz/398 ml) Red kidney beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or heavy medium saucepan, brown the ground beef and drain excess fat.
2. Add the Lipton Tomato Vegetable Soup, tomato sauce, water, kidney beans, corn, chili powder, oregano, and garlic powder; stir to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 15 minutes.
4. Serve sprinkled with grated cheddar cheese and a dollop of sour cream. Accompanied by Nacho Chips. Makes 4-5 servings.
